meaning: n.空中巴士,"空中客车"大型客机
examples: As far as sunken planes go, this Airbus A300 is the largest intentionally sunk aircraft ever.
Both Boeing and Airbus have trumpeted the efficiency of their newest aircraft, the 787 and A350 respectively.
Airbus has a futuristic modular concept involving a passenger capsule that can be detached from the road-going chassis and picked up by a helicopter-type machine.
Airbus told CNN it had not received any requests from the Concorde group about providing support.
Airbus says air passengers already spend more than 500 million hours in the air unnecessarily every year.
